title: rubus lasiotrichos
intro: Rubus lasiotrichos, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lasiotrichos include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
